concerns.text: T008 (Create base directory structure) is positioned at the END of Phase 2, but foundational tasks T004-T007 (schema definitions, logging framework, seed pinning) require the directory structure to exist. T008 must precede T004-T007.
T045 (Implement tie-breaking rules) precedes T046 (Document tie-breaking rules). Per SC-007, documented rules must exist before implementation to ensure consistency. T046 should precede T045.
T007 (Random seed pinning) is positioned after T006 (Logging framework). If logging uses random seeds for operation IDs or timestamps, T007 should precede T006. Confirm logging framework dependency.

User stories marked 'independently testable' but US2 depends on US1 data (T020-T028 needs T011-T018 output), US3 depends on US2 validated data (T030-T041 needs T020-T028), US4 depends on all stories. This implicit cross-story dependency should be documented to clarify 'independent' means 'independent after foundation'.
